surface_verification.justification: Plugin-internal campaign tooling (campaign_init / campaign_progress / autonomous-loop reference). The behavior surface is CLI: the campaign_* scripts are invoked via `uv run`. Exercised end-to-end by the 20-test campaign suite AND a real-CLI boundary probe (init -> start -> update-status x2 -> summary -> legacy-strip) that asserted on-disk status.json + campaign.md frontmatter + stdout against the shipwright-webui consumer contract (PR #96 pickLifecycle: status.json wins, lowercase draft|active|complete, absent -> null -> done<total fallback). No web/UI/API/store/SSE surface.

behaviors.behavior: campaign_init writes top-level status='draft' into status.json (a fresh campaign is planned, not started)
campaign_init writes 'status: draft' into the campaign.md frontmatter (consumer's fallback source)
the `start` subcommand flips top-level status draft->active (and prints active); legacy-safe on a status.json with no prior status field
update-status keeps the campaign 'active' while any sub-iterate is still incomplete (halted campaigns stay visible)
update-status auto-sets top-level status->complete once every sub-iterate is complete, including a legacy campaign on its final sub-iterate
summary prints the top-level lifecycle status; a legacy campaign with no status field yields null (backward-compat fallback signal)
the full draft->active->complete lifecycle round-trips through status.json holding only canonical lowercase values from the producer's declared LIFECYCLE_STATUSES (== webui VALID_LIFECYCLE)
